2605.19929.title: Breaking Modality Heterogeneity in Low-Bit Quantization for Large Vision-Language Models
2605.19929.paper_summary: Low-bit post-training quantization (PTQ) is a pivotal technique for deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on resource-constrained devices. However, existing PTQ methods often degrade VLMs' accuracy due to the heterogeneous activation distributions of text and vision modalities during quantization. We find that this cross-modal heterogeneity is distributed unevenly across channels: a small subset of channels contains most modality-specific outliers, and these outliers typically reside in different channels for each modality. Motivated by this, we propose SplitQ, a channel-Splitting-driven post-training Quantization framework. At its core, SplitQ introduces a novel Modality-specific Outlier Channel Decoupling (MOCD) module that effectively isolates salient modality-specific outlier channels with minimal overhead. To further address the remaining cross-modal distribution discrepancies, we design an Adaptive Cross-Modal Calibration (ACC) module that employs dual lightweight learnable branches to dynamically mitigate modality-induced quantization errors. Extensive experiments on popular VLMs demonstrate that SplitQ significantly outperforms existing approaches across 6 popular multi-modal datasets under all evaluated quantization settings, including W4A8, W4A4, W3A3, and W3A2. Notably, SplitQ preserves 93.5% of FP16 performance under the challenging W3A3 setting (69.5 vs. 74.3), pushing the efficiency frontier for deploying advanced VLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/EMVision-NK/SplitQ
2605.19929.paper_summary_zh: 低位元後訓練量化（PTQ）是將視覺-語言模型（VLMs）部署在資源受限設備上的關鍵技術。<lb/>然而，現有的PTQ方法往往因為量化過程中文本和視覺模態的異質性激活分佈而降低VLM的準確性。<lb/>我們發現這種跨模態的異質性在通道間分佈不均：一小部分通道包含大多數模態特定的異常值，而這些異常值通常位於每個模態的不同通道中。<lb/>受到此啟發，我們提出了SplitQ，一個以通道分割為驅動的後訓練量化框架。<lb/>SplitQ的核心是一個新穎的模態特定異常通道解耦（MOCD）模塊，能有效地以最小的開銷隔離顯著的模態特定異常通道。<lb/>為了進一步解決剩餘的跨模態分佈差異，我們設計了一個自適應跨模態校準（ACC）模塊，該模塊使用雙輕量級可學習分支來動態減輕模態引起的量化誤差。<lb/>在流行的VLM上進行的大量實驗表明，SplitQ在所有評估的量化設置下，包括W4A8、W4A4、W3A3和W3A2，顯著超越現有方法，涵蓋6個流行的多模態數據集。<lb/>值得注意的是，SplitQ在具有挑戰性的W3A3設置下保留了93.5%的FP16性能（69.5對74.3），推動了部署先進VLM的效率邊界。<lb/>我們的代碼可在https://github.com/EMVision-NK/SplitQ獲得。
2605.19929.author: Yi Zhong et.al.
2605.19929.authors: Yi Zhong, Haotong Qin, Xindong Zhang, Lei Zhang, Guolei Sun
